case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS VARGAS JOSE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $544.84 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS JOSE VARGAS MARGARITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS MARGARITA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS JOSE VARGAS MARGARITA $544.84 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $564.84, SETTLEMENT REACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
UNABLE TO SERVE JOSE VARGAS FOR 12-13-91 HRG.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS JOSE VARGAS MARGARITA
